pr.body:
## Ticket #161

# Ticket: Agregar funcionalidad de login y register

## Description
Implementar sistema de autenticación completo con:
- Páginas de login y registro
- Validación de credenciales
- Gestión de sesiones de usuario
- Rutas protegidas
- UI responsive para ambas funcionalidades

## Type: feature
## Priority: high


## Task
Implement this ticket following the recommendations and context above.

## Changelog
- Implementation completed

## Files Changed

8 file(s) modified:
- `app/layout.tsx`
- `components/navigation.tsx`
- `lib/types.ts`
- `app/login/page.tsx`
- `app/registro/page.tsx`
- `components/login-form.tsx`
- `components/register-form.tsx`
- `contexts/auth-context.tsx`


## Testing Notes
Please review the changes and run appropriate tests.
